title: Coding Lab: Build a Linear Regressor
description: Implement gradient descent for a univariate linear regression model and evaluate it on a mini housing dataset.
objectives: Normalize input features and add a bias term
Implement gradient descent updates by hand
Report mean absolute error on held-out samples

tests.name: Predict price of a 1400 sq ft home
Predict price of an 800 sq ft condo

hints: Remember to divide the gradient by n (number of samples)
MAE = mean(|y_true - y_pred|). Use it to report model quality
Keep learning rate small (0.01 - 0.1) to avoid divergence
